alpha-app.description: React Native app with file upload and AI chat.

patterns.chunked-file-upload: Visible upload queue with retry, progress callback, and 2MB chunks (/src/upload/chunked.ts).
patterns.multi-provider-ai-router: Routes prompts between Claude and Gemini based on grounding requirement (/src/ai/router.ts).
patterns.encrypted-local-storage: AES-GCM encryption layer over AsyncStorage with key derivation (/src/lib/crypto.ts).

bravo-platform.description: Next.js platform with AI agents and document ingestion.

patterns.drag-drop-document-uploader: Multi-file drag-drop dropzone with preview thumbnails and S3 direct upload (/src/components/Uploader.tsx).
patterns.anthropic-gemini-ollama-routing: Per-job-type model selection across Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama with availability pings (/src/lib/ai/route.ts).
patterns.encrypted-postgres-columns: Application-side AES-GCM encryption on sensitive Postgres columns (/src/db/encrypt.ts).
patterns.background-task-provider: Long-running task lifecycle exposed to UI via React context with progress beacon (/src/components/BackgroundTaskProvider.tsx).

charlie-cli.description: TypeScript CLI tool for content ingestion.

patterns.streaming-file-upload: tus-protocol resumable uploads with backoff retry (/src/upload/tus.ts).
patterns.claude-cli-shell-out: Shells out to `claude -p` via child_process.spawn instead of using the SDK (/src/ai/claude.ts).
patterns.kebab-case-cli-arg-parser: Custom commander-based parser converting --foo-bar to fooBar at call site (/src/cli/args.ts).

patterns.single-provider-gemini-ocr: Direct Gemini OCR via Cloud Functions proxy (/src/ai/ocr.ts).
patterns.image-manipulator-pre-upload: Resize and compress images before Firebase Storage upload (/src/lib/upload.ts).
patterns.haptics-with-presets: Expo haptics wrapped with named presets — confirm, warn, error (/src/lib/haptics.ts).

patterns.shadcn-style-cli-distribution: init + add commands generate copy-paste components into the consumer (/cli/src/index.ts).
patterns.theme-tokens-with-presets: Five preset palettes + three densities switchable at runtime (/src/theme/tokens.ts).
